title: Topology-Generated Potential (TGP): Matter as the source of space
description: TGP is a conformal scalar-field theory deriving 40 Standard Model and cosmological predictions from 3 inputs (g_0^e = 0.86941, Omega_Lambda = 0.6847, N = 3). Version 1.1 highlights: kinetic coupling alpha=2 proved as algebraic theorem (Lemma A3); Koide B=sqrt(2) confirmed from soliton ODE to 10^{-6}; neutrino mass sum Sigma m_nu = 59.6 meV (normal ordering, IO excluded); DESI DR1 Friedmann fit chi2_TGP ~ chi2_LCDM; GW breathing mode (3rd polarization) prediction for ET/LISA; tensor-to-scalar ratio r = 0.0033 (Starobinsky class). 42 numerical scripts, 385+ tests, >90% pass rate, 0/15 kill criteria violated.
notes: Full manuscript (410+ pages), 4 self-contained papers (N-body, lepton masses, BH shadows, PRL letter), and complete reproducibility package.
